title: grants — PHP attribute contracts
description: Two attributes. #[Grantable] on a class marks the model as a valid grant target and seeds it into GrantableRegistry at boot. #[AsGrantListener] marks a service that reacts to grant lifecycle events (used by consumer modules that need to respond to grant issue / revoke on their aggregates).

attributes.name: Grantable
attributes.description: Class-level marker on models that can be granted. Boot-time discovery scans #[Grantable]-annotated classes and seeds them into GrantableRegistry with their resource_type key. Composes with the HasResourceGrants + IsGrantable traits.

params.name: resource_type
params.description: The `resource_type` key stored on access_grants.resource_type. Defaults to snake_case of the class basename (e.g. `Invoice` → `invoice`). Override for legacy naming or namespace collision.

params.name: display_label
params.description: Human-readable label rendered in the share-access dialog. Localised via `grants.resources.{resource_type}` translation key when present.

params.name: preflight_validator
params.description: Optional preflight validator invoked before grant creation. Consumers use this to enforce resource-specific rules (e.g. 'can't grant on a soft-deleted invoice', 'can't grant guardian-of-athlete for an athlete already assigned to another guardian').

params.name: permission_prefix
params.description: Prefix expected on permissions granted for this resource type. E.g. `invoice` → permissions like `invoice.view`, `invoice.edit`. Enforced by PermissionCatalogueValidator to catch typos.

params.name: allow_deny
params.description: Whether deny grants are allowed on this resource type. Almost always true — a consumer setting this to false is unusual (e.g. a resource where 'implicit deny via absence of role' is the only mechanism).

params.name: target_picker_screen_ref
params.description: Optional SDUI screen reference the share-access dialog embeds when the caller picks this resource type. Zero coupling — the grants module renders whatever the consumer supplies.

attributes.name: AsGrantListener
attributes.description: Marks a service class as a grant-lifecycle listener. Boot-time discovery registers the class with Laravel's event dispatcher for the specified grant events. Alternative to manual EventServiceProvider wiring — keeps grant-adjacent listener registration self-contained.

params.name: events
params.description: The specific grant events this listener responds to (e.g. ['GrantIssued', 'GrantRevoked']). Default `['*']` = every grant event.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue name for the listener. Null = sync.
